queryModel.prompt: Generate 3 distinct search queries to find the official websites of companies offering Sprachschulen in {{location}}. Focus on finding direct company websites only. Do not include directories, lists, or aggregators.

selectModel.prompt: Select only the official company websites from the search results. Exclude directories (like Yelp, Yellow Pages, Google Maps), social media profiles, and aggregator sites. Only select direct company websites.
